items.name: voicetree
items.description: The spatial IDE for recursive multi-agent orchestration. It's like an Obsidian graph-view that you work directly inside of.

items.name: agent-sandbox
items.description: agent-sandbox enables easy management of isolated, stateful, singleton workloads, ideal for use cases like AI agent runtimes.

items.name: DashClaw
items.description: 🛡️Decision infrastructure for AI agents. Intercept actions, enforce guard policies, require approvals, and produce audit-ready decision trails.

items.name: studio
items.description: Open-source control plane for your AI agents. Connect tools, hire agents, track every token and dollar

items.name: oh-my-claudecode
items.description: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

items.name: deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

items.name: 49Agents
items.description: Open-source 2D IDE for managing AI agents in native CLIs, terminal, gits, beads issues, and files across multiple projects and machines. Self-host on a single machine via localhost OR host on a cluster via Tailscale OR connect to app.49agents.com (coming soon)

items.name: stoneforge
items.description: A web dashboard and runtime for orchestrating AI coding agents

items.name: composio
items.description: Composio powers 1000+ toolkits, tool search, context management, authentication, and a sandboxed workbench to help you build AI agents that turn intent into action.

items.name: loongclaw
items.description: Lightweight, clear, and fully extensible AI agent infrastructure — learn easily, customize anything 🐉
